description_long: This is a single-story house with a rectangular footprint, constructed primarily from light-colored brick or stone. The front features a raised porch with railings and a set of steps leading up, while the rear and sides are bordered by landscaped earth and a grassy yard. Large windows are distributed across the exterior walls, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is set on a slightly elevated foundation, with a prominent outdoor staircase on one side and a tree planted in the yard. The roof is flat and unfinished, suggesting either ongoing construction or a modern minimalist design. The overall appearance is clean and functional, with simple lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A single-story, light-brick house with a flat roof, large windows, a raised porch, and landscaped yard. Features include a side staircase, front porch, and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the raised porch with railings, large windows, and the main entry area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor staircase, sloped landscaping, and partial view of the porch.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with windows and a tree in the yard, no porch visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat wall with large windows, the tree, and the porch extending from the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a raised porch with railings, wide steps, and a simple door with no overhang or decorative columns.
